title: MF FAIL: wrong asymptote (2/3 claimed as limit, not 1-sqrt(2)/4)
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: claims the asymptotic male fraction is 2/3 (the m=9 exact value), which is wrong — the true limit is 1-sqrt(2)/4 approx 0.6464. Also gap is declared 0.0 instead of sqrt(2)/4-1/3 approx 0.0202. Validates MF_ASY and MF_GAP fail paths. Sources: Iverson (1975-1996) QA-1/QA-2 ISBN none (unpublished); Hardy+Wright (2008) Oxford ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5.
sources: Ben Iverson, Pythagoras and the Quantum World Vol.1-2 (QA-1/QA-2, 1975-1996)
Hardy, G.H. and Wright, E.M. (2008) An Introduction to the Theory of Numbers, Oxford ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5

fail_ledger.reason: declared asymptote=2/3=0.6667 but true value is 1-sqrt(2)/4=0.6464; off by 0.0202
